title: Pre-computed porkchop grid
description: A pre-computed Lambert porkchop for an Earth → destination transfer. Generated at build time by scripts/precompute-porkchops.ts; consumed by /plan via $lib/data#getPorkchopGrid. ADR-026 §Data file contract.

destination.description: Destination id. Matches the DestinationId enum in $lib/lambert-grid.constants (ADR-026 + ADR-028).

dep_range_days.description: Departure-day range [start, end] in days from epoch.

tof_range_days.description: Transfer-time range [start, end] in days. Per-destination calibration; Mars stays [80, 520] for no-regression.

steps.description: Grid dimensions [width, height]. Locked to [112, 100] across all destinations so the mobile magnifier (ADR-023) stays valid.

mission_types.description: Mission types offered for this destination. Inner planets get both; gas giants FLYBY only (ADR-026 §Mission-type semantics).

dv_orbit_insertion.description: Per-mission-type ∆v added to each cell when displayed. FLYBY is always 0; LANDING is destination-specific (Mars ≈ 4.1, Venus ≈ 3.7, Mercury ≈ 8.6 km/s).

tof_axis_unit.description: Y-axis tick label unit. ADR-026 §Y-axis units: auto-switch to years when tof_range_days[1] > 730.

grid.description: 2D grid of ∆v values, indexed [row][col]. row = TOF axis (height = steps[1]); col = departure axis (width = steps[0]). Values are in km/s; sentinel 28 is used for cells where Lambert returned no solution.

credit.description: Provenance + how the grid was computed. Required so future readers can trace the values back.
